name: Rose Stone Terrarium Decorative Filler Red - Threshold™
description:
Add depth and color to your terrarium with this Rose Stone Terrarium Decorative Filler from Threshold™. Crafted from natural stone in rose/red colors, this filler is designed to enhance terrariums, glass containers or tabletop displays. The textured finish brings visual interest and contrast, making it easy to layer with plants, candles or other decorative accents.

Threshold™: Looks like home, feels like you.
